title: Add depth recurrence + SwiGLU submission (Apple M3 8GB)
author: iranzithierry

data.description: Reuses 4 unique transformer blocks 3 times each to create 12 effective layers with shared weights.
Replaces the baseline relu² MLP with a gated SiLU/SwiGLU feed-forward network for better parameter efficiency.
Shares transformer block weights across recurrent passes to save artifact space.
Input and output embeddings are tied.
Uses fewer KV heads than attention heads.
Preserves encoder-decoder skip connections from the baseline, storing skip tensors in the encoder half and consuming them in reverse order in the decoder half.
Wider model enabled by weight sharing, increasing model dimension to 640 and attention heads to 10.

novel_contributions: Depth recurrence with 4 unique transformer blocks reused 3 times for 12 effective layers
SwiGLU MLP replacing relu² for improved parameter efficiency
Per-recurrence learnable gate scalars for specialization
Wider model enabled by weight sharing (640 dim, 10 heads)
U-Net style skip connections preserved from the baseline
Gradient clipping added for stability with recurrent depth
